scope: Photoslive local-first booth, cloud control plane, providers, and customer delivery
trustBoundaries: authenticated admin or superadmin browser to cloud API
cloud API to database, cache, object storage, and external providers
cloud command queue to Photoslive Agent
Local Controller to SQLite, filesystem, camera, and printer
customer download link to session assets

threats.title: Attacker claims a machine using a stolen or replayed setup code
controls: installation token kept outside browser UI
threats.residualRisk: One-time consumption, brute-force rate limiting, and physical installer provenance still need production verification.

threats.title: Stolen browser session is used to control a booth
threats.residualRisk: Remote passkeys, complete session revocation, and full CSRF verification remain open.

threats.title: An authenticated user reads or mutates another booth tenant
threats.residualRisk: Production Supabase runtime tests and complete cutover from legacy Redis are not finished.

threats.title: Forged or replayed hardware command reaches a booth
threats.residualRisk: Signing-key rotation and production clock-skew monitoring must be exercised during rollout.

threats.title: Network attacker invokes privileged Local Controller operations
threats.residualRisk: A fully compromised operating-system account remains in the local trust boundary.

threats.title: Provider or installation credentials leak through client bundles, logs, or telemetry
threats.residualRisk: Central encrypted credential rotation and production secret-scanning gates remain open.

threats.title: Customer session assets are guessed, retained too long, or exposed to another customer
threats.residualRisk: Early deletion workflow, consent records, cloud lifecycle acceptance, and privacy drill remain open.

threats.title: An offline voucher is redeemed more than once or replayed after reconnect
threats.residualRisk: Extended clock drift and multi-device allocation conflicts require pilot fault testing.

threats.title: Disk exhaustion or cleanup deletes unsynced customer photos
threats.residualRisk: Physical SSD failure still requires tested external backup and restore procedures.

threats.title: Forged or replayed payment webhook unlocks a session or print
controls: QRIS capability hidden until a production adapter is configured
threats.residualRisk: Webhook signature verification, replay protection, transaction idempotency, and reconciliation are not implemented.

threats.title: Unauthorized payout or bank-account change transfers booth funds
threats.residualRisk: KYC, live bank reconciliation, and production payout acceptance must pass before enablement.

threats.title: Tampered installer or Agent update gains control of a machine
threats.residualRisk: Signed Windows, notarized macOS, signed Debian packages, atomic update, and rollback health checks are not production-complete.

threats.title: Telemetry or audit views disclose secrets or excessive personal data
threats.residualRisk: Formal data classification, retention enforcement, and redaction regression coverage remain incomplete.

threats.title: Public or authenticated traffic exhausts cloud or local resources
threats.residualRisk: Global API rate limits, abuse analytics, and production load testing remain open.

threats.title: Camera, printer, or remote preview is used without clear operator/customer intent
threats.residualRisk: Remote snapshot consent, expiry, and cross-platform real-device acceptance remain open.
